nodes.name: Salmon Salad Wrap — Citrus Fresh Style
nodes.description: name: Salmon Salad Wrap — Citrus Fresh Style | short_description: Protein-packed salmon yogurt salad wrapped in a whole-wheat tortilla with celery and greens. | meal_suggestion: Mix salmon with Greek
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Salmon Salad Wrap — Citrus Fresh Style - name: Salmon Salad Wrap — Citrus Fresh Style | short_description: Protein-packed salmon yogurt salad wrapped in a whole-wheat tortilla with celery and greens. | meal_suggestion: Mix salmon with Greek yogurt and diced celery; fill a whole-wheat tortilla with greens to assemble a crunchy, protein-forward wrap. Add a splash of lemon juice for the citrus lift if desired. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich wrap with omega-3s from canned salmon and calcium from Greek yogurt. Includes fiber from whole-wheat tortilla and greens plus crunchy celery. Be mindful of sodium in canned salmon; citrus brightness can be added with a squeeze of lemon for the Citrus Fresh Style.

nodes.name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Citrus Fresh Bake
nodes.description: name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Citrus Fresh Bake | short_description: A bright, protein-forward pasta salad with tuna, cucumber, and tomatoes dressed in olive oil—easy to prepare and versatile. | meal_sugge
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Tuna Pasta Salad — Citrus Fresh Bake - name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Citrus Fresh Bake | short_description: A bright, protein-forward pasta salad with tuna, cucumber, and tomatoes dressed in olive oil—easy to prepare and versatile. | meal_suggestion: Cook pasta until al dente, drain. In a bowl, fold in drained canned tuna, diced cucumber, and halved cherry tomatoes. Drizzle with olive oil and toss to coat. Chill for a refreshing cold salad or serve warm. Optional: add a squeeze of citrus juice or zest to echo the Citrus theme. | nutrition_note: Excellent protein source from tuna and a balanced portion of carbohydrates from pasta. Olive oil provides heart-healthy fats; vegetables add fiber and micronutrients. If using canned tuna, choose low-sodium or rinse to reduce sodium.

nodes.name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Wrap
nodes.description: name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Wrap | short_description: Mediterranean grain bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, feta, and olive oil; protein- and fiber-rich with a calcium b
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Wrap - name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Wrap | short_description: Mediterranean grain bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, feta, and olive oil; protein- and fiber-rich with a calcium boost. | meal_suggestion: Serve as a bowl or wrap; brighten with lemon juice and fresh herbs (parsley, mint). For a dairy-free version, substitute feta with avocado or olives and reduce olive oil to lower calories. | nutrition_note: High in plant-based protein and fiber from quinoa and chickpeas; includes calcium from feta and heart-healthy fats from olive oil; moderate sodium due to cheese.
